examples.title: Algorithm: Stack Push Operation
examples.description: Adds an element to the top of the stack
examples.code:
ALGORITHM push(value)
INPUT: value to be pushed onto stack
OUTPUT: updated stack with new top element

BEGIN
 IF isFull() THEN
 DISPLAY error message 'Stack Overflow'
 EXIT
 END IF
 top = top + 1
 stack[top] = value
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the push algorithm
